lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you guys hanging around here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... yeah, sorry about that. Why are you all standing around out here?

lines.speaker: Archer
lines.text: Well, that's really none of your business.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after learning how to enter Zanaris

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you didn't find the entrance to Zanaris yet, huh?

lines.speaker: Archer
lines.text: Don't tell me a novice like YOU has found it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep. Found it REALLY easily too.

lines.speaker: Archer
lines.text: ...I cannot believe that someone like YOU could find the portal where experienced adventurers such as ourselves could not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Believe what you want. Enjoy your little camp fire.
